title: hymenophyllum laminatum
intro: Hymenophyllum laminatum, also known as the ladder fern or lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae and is native to New Zealand and Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum laminatum include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a digestive aid. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or boiling them in water to release its medicinal properties.
